Football : Ligue 2 BKT
programme.desc: Ancien pensionnaire de Ligue 1 il y a peu, Amiens lutte désormais pour son maintien en Ligue 2. Dans le cadre de la 22e journée, les Amiénois reçoivent Clermont, une autre équipe qui lutte pour sa survie. Les Picards peuvent compter sur leur international comorien Rayan Lutin pour les emmener vers la victoire.

programme.title: beIN STORY
programme.desc: beIN STORY est un rendez-vous documentaire, de 70 à 90 minutes, revenant sur un moment clé de l'histoire du sport ou sur une légende des stades. L'émission est présentée par le ou la journaliste et l'un(e) des consultant(e)s du sport concerné. Evènement imprévu, athlète au destin tragique ou moment crucial qui a changé pour toujours une discipline sportive, beIN STORY présente de grands documentai

programme.title: FNF: Leeds v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: On Friday Night Football, Leeds and Forest clash in the Premier League. Both six points clear of 18th, a win here for either team could prove pivotal in the race for survival. (06.02)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Chelsea Hlts
programme.desc: Liam Rosenior's Chelsea eye a fourth consecutive Premier League win in a trip to Wolves. Rob Edwards' men were beaten 2-0 by Bournemouth here last weekend. (07.02)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Nuno Espirito Santo takes West Ham to Turf Moor for a relegation six-pointer against Burnley. Already struggling, defeat here could prove terminal for the Claret's survival hopes. (07.02)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Fulham welcome Everton to the Cottage for this Premier League encounter. Despite a frustrating campaign for the Toffees so far, David Moyes' men are still in the hunt for Europe. (07.02)

programme.title: PL: Bournemouth v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: Clinging to fading hopes of the title, third-placed Aston Villa venture to the South Coast to play Bournemouth. Four games unbeaten, Andoni Iraola has his Cherries firing again. (07.02)

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: Getting the job done at Leeds, it's another promoted side for the leaders Arsenal as Regis Le Bris' tricky Sunderland - who find themselves in the race for Europe - come next. (07.02)

programme.title: SNF: Newcastle v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Newcastle return to St James' Park looking to avoid a third straight Premier League defeat. The visitors Brentford claimed a surprise three points at Villa Park previously. (07.02)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Crystal Palace Hlts
programme.desc: After a turbulent transfer window, Crystal Palace's focus returns to the Premier League with a Super Sunday clash at the Amex Stadium against bitter rivals Brighton. (08.02)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Anfield awaits Pep Guardiola's Manchester City as his title hopefuls - on the back foot after a two-all with Spurs - take on Arne Slot's reigning Premier League champions Liverpool. (08.02)
